name: Lentil & Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 oz peeled tomatoes (or small can drained, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 190°C, Gas mark 5, or 375°F.
2. Cook the lentils until soft.
3. Cook the spinach until tender and drain any excess liquid.
4. Season the spinach with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
5. Spread the spinach over the base of an ovenproof dish.
6. Arrange the sliced tomatoes on top.
7. Pour the cooked lentils over the tomatoes, spreading to the edge of the dish.
8. Top with non-fat yogurt.
9. Bake in the oven for approximately 35 minutes.
This is great with steamed new potatoes or noodles.
